page_content:
The Counseling Service

301-405-2838 diversity.umd.edu

The Office of Diversity and Inclusion provides leadership and expertise to support the university achieve its diversity, equity and inclusion goals. ODI houses several units that offer support to students, including ADA compliance, Bias Incident Support Services (BISS), the LGBTQ+ Equity Center, the Nyumburu Cultural Center, the Office of Multi-ethnic Student Education (OMSE) and TerrapinSTRONG Education. ODI also coordinates with Diversity Officers and other partners across campus. Students may contact ODI at DiverseTerps@umd.edu for support or to be connected to resources.
